title: Emergency cash and document packet
summary: Keep small cash denominations, identity copies, insurance and property references, emergency contacts, medication list, and essential account recovery details protected.
content: Keep small cash denominations, identity copies, insurance and property references, emergency contacts, medication list, and essential account recovery details protected. Store encrypted or sealed backups in more than one safe location when lawful and practical. Do not keep every original document, password, and all cash in the same bag.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Emergency cash and document packet”.
Pencil. Context: “Emergency cash and document packet”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Emergency cash and document packet»
steps: Keep small cash denominations, identity copies, insurance and property references, emergency contacts, medication list, and essential account recovery details protected.
Store encrypted or sealed backups in more than one safe location when lawful and practical.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Emergency cash and document packet.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Emergency cash and document packet.
warnings: Do not keep every original document, password, and all cash in the same bag.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Emergency cash and document packet.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Emergency cash and document packet.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Emergency cash and document packet.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Emergency cash and document packet.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Emergency cash and document packet.

when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Emergency cash and document packet.
short_term: For Emergency cash and document packet, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Emergency cash and document packet, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Emergency cash and document packet, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Emergency cash and document packet to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
